title: NodeIdentity
description: Identity record for a node in the OpenClaw sovereign runtime, tracking its role, trust chain version, and lifecycle status.

node_role.description: The functional role of this node in the runtime.

trust_chain_version.description: The version of the trust chain this node identity belongs to.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of this node.

environment_class.description: Optional classification of the environment this node operates in.

attestation_key_fingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint of the attestation key associated with this node. Null if no key has been assigned.

key_registry_ref.description: Optional reference to the key registry entry for this node.

baseline_manifest_ref.description: Optional reference to the baseline manifest for this node.

created_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp of when this node identity was created. Null if creation time is unknown.
